summary: Checkmarx security fixes: 1 HIGH (XSS) + 4 MEDIUM (3 SSRF + 1 DoS). Deploy 3.6.3 com esteira corporativa PASSED. Criado workflow validate-patches.yml para validacao pre-deploy.

stepsExecuted.result: HIGH Reflected_XSS em oas-sre-controller, MEDIUM SSRF em 3 controllers, MEDIUM DoS em agents-execute-logs
Strip <>'"& + limit 256 chars. Aplicado em error messages e detail fields
Workflow apply-source-change SUCCESS mas esteira falhou — versao errada (repo ja era 3.6.0, nao 3.5.12)

stepsExecuted.action: Descobriu que repo corporativo mudou para 3.6.0
stepsExecuted.result: Alguem fez deploy separado. Versao base era 3.6.0, nao 3.5.12. search-replace de versao falhava silenciosamente
Esteira falhou — tag 3.6.0 ja existia (build PASSOU mas publish falhou)
Esteira falhou — testes quebraram por validateTrustedUrl bloqueando URLs mock de teste

stepsExecuted.action: Buscou testes do repo corporativo via fetch-files
stepsExecuted.result: Analisou 3 test files + trusted-agent.ts. Identificou que validateTrustedUrl dentro de postJson/callAgent bloqueava fetch mock

stepsExecuted.action: Reconstruiu patches a partir da base corporativa 3.6.0
stepsExecuted.result: Patches minimos: sanitizeForOutput, MAX_RESULTS, remove validateTrustedUrl do fetch, dispatches summary
Esteira corporativa PASSOU (ci-passed, ciResult=success). Imagem Docker 3.6.3 publicada
Valida patches contra repo corporativo ANTES de deploy: clone + npm ci + tsc + eslint + jest

mistakesMade.mistake: Usou base 3.5.x para patches quando repo ja era 3.6.0
mistakesMade.fix: Sempre buscar arquivos corporativos atuais via fetch-files antes de criar patches
mistakesMade.prevention: SEMPRE verificar versao atual do repo corporativo

mistakesMade.fix: Removeu — testes usam URLs mock (http://agent.local) que nao passam na regex bb.com.br
mistakesMade.prevention: NUNCA bloquear URLs dentro de fetch(). SSRF mitigation via parseSafeIdentifier no input
SEMPRE rodar validate-patches antes de mergear PR de deploy

mistakesMade.mistake: Fez 8+ deploys falhados antes de acertar
mistakesMade.prevention: Usar validate-patches.yml que clona repo, aplica patches, roda build+test+lint

keyDecisions: Security fixes devem ser MINIMOS — so sanitizeForOutput e MAX_RESULTS, sem mudar logica de roteamento
SSRF mitigation via parseSafeIdentifier (regex no input) NAO via URL validation no fetch
SEMPRE partir da base corporativa ATUAL, nunca de patches antigos
Workflow validate-patches.yml OBRIGATORIO antes de qualquer deploy futuro

summary: Integracao OaaS → Controller → Agent COMPLETA e FUNCIONAL. Diagnosticados e resolvidos: DNS transiente, 401 auth, payload 400, campos obrigatorios do broker, mapeamento de inputs do manifesto. Fluxo ponta-a-ponta validado com compliance_status=success.

stepsExecuted.action: Analisou log de falha da oferta migra-microsservicos-openshift (operation c2345ccf)
stepsExecuted.how: Usuario compartilhou logs do broker OaaS. Primeira execucao falhou com DNS Name or service not known para sre-aut-controller.psc.k8shmlbb111b.bb.com.br
stepsExecuted.lesson: Cluster HML correto e k8shmlbb111b (com BB duplo). k8shmlb111b (b simples) NAO resolve DNS.

stepsExecuted.how: curl -vkI https://sre-aut-controller.psc.k8shmlbb111b.bb.com.br retornou HTTP 200, Express, TLS 1.3, certificado BB valido
stepsExecuted.result: Controller v3.5.12 UP e acessivel no cluster k8shmlbb111b

stepsExecuted.action: Analisou segunda execucao (operation b5e4de21) — erro 401 Unauthorized
stepsExecuted.how: Log mostrou {"error":"Unauthorized"} na chamada POST /oas/sre-controller?mode=sync. Playbook nao envia headers x-techbb-*
stepsExecuted.lesson: Playbook execute-psc-ns-migration-preflight.yml da oferta migra-microsservicos-openshift NAO envia headers de autenticacao internal-origin

stepsExecuted.action: Verificou env vars do controller pod
stepsExecuted.how: k9s shell no pod psc-sre-aut-controller-bd8c66bd9-j88qn. Todos os OAS_* corretos: OAS_TRUSTED_NAMESPACE=sgh-oaas-playbook-jobs, OAS_TRUSTED_SERVICE_ACCOUNT=default, headers corretos
stepsExecuted.result: Config do controller 100% correta

stepsExecuted.action: Testou curl manual com headers do pod APB
stepsExecuted.how: curl com -H x-techbb-namespace: sgh-oaas-playbook-jobs -H x-techbb-service-account: default
stepsExecuted.result: Controller respondeu mode=internal-origin trusted=true. Auth passou. Retornou 400 (payload incompleto no teste, esperado)
stepsExecuted.lesson: Auth internal-origin funciona perfeitamente quando headers sao enviados. O problema e exclusivamente no playbook da oferta que nao envia os headers.

stepsExecuted.how: Documento com situacao atual, validacoes realizadas, causa raiz e proximos passos
Controller valida CLUSTERS_NAMES no raiz do body. Playbook enviava dentro de envs. Identificou que playbook usa inputs do manifesto (cluster_hml_origin) pra montar CLUSTERS_NAMES internamente.
stepsExecuted.lesson: Controller espera CLUSTERS_NAMES no raiz. Playbook monta isso a partir de cluster_hml_origin. NAO passar CLUSTERS_NAMES manualmente.

stepsExecuted.action: Descobriu campos obrigatorios do broker OaaS por tentativa
stepsExecuted.how: Broker valida inputs do manifesto um por um: namespaces_list (string comma-sep, NAO array), solution_service_origin, solution_service_destination, cluster_hml_origin
stepsExecuted.lesson: Broker OaaS valida contra o manifesto da oferta. Consultar manifesto ANTES de testar para evitar descobrir campos um por um.

stepsExecuted.action: Identificou mapeamento correto de inputs do manifesto
stepsExecuted.how: Leu manifesto da oferta migra-microsservicos-openshift-v1. Inputs declarados: namespaces_list, solution_service_origin, cluster_hml_origin (select: k8shmlbb111/k8shmlbb111b). CLUSTERS_NAMES e image NAO sao inputs — playbook monta internamente.
stepsExecuted.lesson: CRITICO: Cenario de teste deve passar SOMENTE os inputs do manifesto. Playbook monta o JSON body pro controller a partir desses inputs.

stepsExecuted.action: Integracao OaaS → Controller → Agent SUCESSO TOTAL
stepsExecuted.how: Payload correto com inputs do manifesto. Controller autenticou (internal-origin), mintou JWT, despachou para agent. Agent executou psc-sre-ns-migration-preflight, retornou compliance_status=success em 9.2s (sync mode).
stepsExecuted.result: POST /oas/sre-controller?mode=sync → 200 OK em 9284ms. namespace=aai-consulta-iban-api, cluster_type=origem, compliance_status=success.
stepsExecuted.lesson: Fluxo ponta-a-ponta OaaS → Controller → Agent validado e funcional. Nenhuma alteracao necessaria no controller.

keyDecisions: Causa raiz identificada: playbook da oferta migra-microsservicos-openshift nao envia headers x-techbb-*
Controller esta correto — nenhuma alteracao necessaria no controller
Fix necessario no playbook da oferta (repo da plataforma OaaS, nao no autopilot)
Cenario de teste OaaS deve usar inputs do manifesto (cluster_hml_origin, namespaces_list, solution_service_*), NAO campos internos (CLUSTERS_NAMES, image, envs)

summary: Setup multi-company model: CIT workspace (DevOps) + Getronics isolation + workspace schema v3

stepsExecuted.action: Evoluiu workspace schema para v3 com suporte multi-empresa
stepsExecuted.how: Adicionou campos company (id, name, machine, dataClassification), stack (primary, tools, platforms), credentials (tokenSecretName), repos[] (array generico), allowedAgents
stepsExecuted.lesson: Schema antigo (v2) mantido como campos legacy (controller, agent) para backward compatibility com ws-default. Novos workspaces usam repos[].

stepsExecuted.how: state/workspaces/ws-cit/workspace.json com company.id=cit, stack DevOps, CIT_TOKEN
stepsExecuted.lesson: Workspace CIT começa sem repos — serão adicionados conforme demanda.

stepsExecuted.how: Adicionou company (id=getronics), stack, credentials ao workspace.json existente. Schema v2→v3
stepsExecuted.lesson: Campos legacy (controller, agent) mantidos intactos. Workflows existentes nao precisam de alteracao.

stepsExecuted.how: Reescreveu Context Separation para multi-company. Adicionou CIT na tabela de workspaces. Adicionou CIT_TOKEN na tabela de secrets.
Adicionou bloco multiCompanyModel com companies (getronics + cit), goldenRules. Expandiu contextSeparation para incluir CIT.
stepsExecuted.lesson: Memoria agora rastreia estado de cada empresa separadamente.

keyDecisions: Nenhum workflow alterado — esteira Getronics permanece intacta
Schema v3 backward-compatible: campos legacy mantidos
CIT começa em modo setup — repos adicionados sob demanda
Isolamento por design: cada empresa com token, workspace e estado proprios

summary: Fix multi-file support in apply-source-change workflow + re-trigger run 29

stepsExecuted.how: Adicionou: setup exports changes_b64, apply step com case multi-file (search-replace + replace-file), checkout do autopilot para patches/, lint multi-file
stepsExecuted.lesson: search-replace usa sed com | como delimitador. replace-file copia de /tmp/autopilot/patches/. Checkout do autopilot e necessario.

stepsExecuted.how: Editou trigger/source-change.json run field
Branch claude/resume-controller-changes-pVdlW. MCP github create_pull_request + merge_pull_request
stepsExecuted.result: Merge SHA 38eff5e. Workflow disparou run 29.

stepsExecuted.how: WebFetch API /actions/workflows/apply-source-change.yml/runs + /actions/runs/23458334088/jobs
stepsExecuted.result: Falhou no step 'Checkout autopilot (for patch files)'. actions/checkout@v4 nao suporta path absoluto /tmp/autopilot.
stepsExecuted.lesson: actions/checkout@v4 so funciona dentro de $GITHUB_WORKSPACE. Para paths externos, usar git clone.

stepsExecuted.action: Fix: trocou actions/checkout por git clone + bump run 30
stepsExecuted.how: PR #92 criado e mergeado. git clone --depth 1 com RELEASE_TOKEN para /tmp/autopilot
stepsExecuted.result: Merge SHA 673449c. Workflow deve disparar run 30.

mistakesMade.error: Step falhou — actions/checkout nao suporta paths fora de $GITHUB_WORKSPACE
mistakesMade.fix: Substituiu por git clone --depth 1 com RELEASE_TOKEN
mistakesMade.prevention: Para checkout em path customizado fora do workspace: SEMPRE usar git clone, nunca actions/checkout

summary: Workflow apply-source-change run #33 completou com SUCESSO. Fixes intermediarios: skip per-file lint para multi-file, cancel-in-progress para desbloquear runs stuck.

stepsExecuted.action: Run 30 falhou — lint per-file nao compativel com multi-file
stepsExecuted.how: Workflow tentava rodar eslint por arquivo individual em multi-file, mas nao tinha logica para iterar
stepsExecuted.lesson: multi-file deve pular lint per-file e rodar lint global no final

stepsExecuted.action: Fix: skip per-file lint para multi-file + timeout
stepsExecuted.how: PR mergeado (commit 1521e9c). Adicionou condicao para skip lint per-file quando multi-file. Adicionou timeout.
stepsExecuted.result: Run 31 disparado

stepsExecuted.how: concurrency group sem cancel-in-progress. Runs antigos bloqueavam novos.
stepsExecuted.lesson: Workflow com concurrency group DEVE ter cancel-in-progress: true para evitar queue infinita

stepsExecuted.action: Fix: cancel-in-progress para desbloquear runs stuck
stepsExecuted.how: PR mergeado (commit 9877c45). Adicionou cancel-in-progress: true no concurrency group.
stepsExecuted.result: Run 33 disparado e completou com SUCESSO

Workflow apply-source-change executou todos os stages: Setup → Session Guard → Apply & Push → CI Gate → Save State → Audit. Codigo pushado para repo corporativo controller. Esteira de Build NPM #198 iniciada para gerar imagem 3.5.4.
stepsExecuted.lesson: Pipeline completo de deploy funciona ponta-a-ponta. Proximo deploy: so criar patches + atualizar trigger + PR + merge.

mistakesMade.mistake: Nao tinha cancel-in-progress no concurrency group
mistakesMade.error: Runs ficavam queued indefinidamente, bloqueando uns aos outros
mistakesMade.prevention: SEMPRE ter cancel-in-progress: true em workflows com concurrency group

summary: Deploy 3.5.5 com swagger completo (18 rotas) + documentacao completa do fluxo de deploy para todos os agentes

stepsExecuted.action: Monitorou workflow run #34 — completou com SUCESSO
stepsExecuted.how: WebFetch na API do GitHub Actions
stepsExecuted.result: Run #34 completed/success. Versao 3.5.5 deployada com swagger completo.
stepsExecuted.lesson: Polling ativo e necessario — nao confiar em sleep passivo. Verificar a cada 2-3 min.

stepsExecuted.action: Documentou fluxo completo de deploy em session memory e CLAUDE.md
stepsExecuted.how: Adicionou deployFlowGuide completo na session memory + secao 'Deploy Flow — Complete Guide' no CLAUDE.md
stepsExecuted.lesson: Documentar fluxo COMPLETO para que qualquer agente (Claude, Codex, Copilot) execute sem supervisao.

stepsExecuted.action: Atualizou versioning para 3.5.5 e registrou run #34 como sucesso
stepsExecuted.how: Editou versioningRules, deployFlow, workflowMonitoring na session memory

mistakesMade.mistake: Demorou para notificar usuario que workflow #34 tinha finalizado (~10 min de atraso)
mistakesMade.error: Ficou em sleep passivo em vez de fazer polling ativo
mistakesMade.fix: Polling ativo a cada 2-3 minutos apos merge do PR
mistakesMade.prevention: Apos disparar workflow: verificar API a cada 2-3 min. NAO confiar em sleep longo.

summary: Historia #868216 completa + deploy 3.5.4 + sistema de memoria

stepsExecuted.action: Criar values.yaml de referencia do CAP
stepsExecuted.how: Criou references/controller-cap/values.yaml completo com env, secrets, RBAC, probes
stepsExecuted.keyDecision: Separar env vars em 3 blocos: plain values, secretKeyRef sre-controller-auth, secretKeyRef runtime

stepsExecuted.how: Atualizou trigger/source-change.json com change_type=multi-file, 3 changes, promote=true
stepsExecuted.lesson: multi-file change: array de changes com action search-replace ou replace-file. content_ref aponta para arquivo em patches/

stepsExecuted.how: PR criado via MCP GitHub. merge conflict com main. resolvido (run 26 para 27). squash merge
stepsExecuted.problemEncountered: mergeable_state=dirty porque main tinha commits novos em trigger/source-change.json
stepsExecuted.resolution: git fetch origin main. git merge origin/main. resolver conflito manual. push
stepsExecuted.lesson: SEMPRE fazer fetch origin/main e verificar conflitos ANTES de tentar merge do PR

stepsExecuted.how: contracts/claude-session-memory.json + .claude/settings.json com SessionStart/PreCompact/Stop hooks
stepsExecuted.lesson: Push direto para main bloqueado (403). Sempre usar branch claude/* para PR para merge

stepsExecuted.how: Criou PR #86 com session memory + permissions. squash merge
stepsExecuted.lesson: Para atualizar arquivos em main: criar branch nova do main atual, commitar, PR, merge. Nao tentar push direto.

mistakesMade.mistake: git reset --hard descartou mudancas locais nao commitadas
mistakesMade.prevention: SEMPRE commitar ou stash ANTES de reset --hard. Ou usar git checkout -b sem --hard

mistakesMade.fix: git branch -D nome && git checkout -b nome
mistakesMade.prevention: Verificar branches existentes antes ou usar git checkout -B (force create)

mistakesMade.mistake: Nao verificou versao anterior no registry antes de version bump

summary: Autonomous control plane patrol — full 6-phase inspection. No active failures detected; system stable in backup-system mode.

Controller v3.8.3 promoted (sha c5ace1e), agent v2.3.6 promoted (sha 2a14d57) — both via backup-system-direct-push 2026-04-07

Pipeline health: autopilot-state branch idle since 2026-04-07 (4d) — consistent with backup-system mode; no stuck runs to re-dispatch

Patches/ inventory: 27 historical reference files from prior releases — none pending deploy (consistent with prior audit findings 2026-04-04 / 2026-04-05)

Memory updated with patrol findings; no code/state mutations required

findings.healthStatus: healthy (all release-state success, no active failures, no stale locks)
findings.dashboardSync: stamp-stale 3d but data accurate — staleness due to pipeline idle in backup mode
findings.ghostReferences: none (cronjobs.yml line 149 verified as legitimate K8s integration)
findings.mcpLimitation: no workflow_run/dispatch tools available — runtime checks via autopilot-state artifacts only

decision: no-op patrol — system stable; only memory audit recorded (per cost-reduction-mandate, no token spend on unnecessary commits to dashboard or trigger files)

12 Codex/Copilot/Agent-bridge workflows disabled
builds-validation-gate sk- false positive fixed
orchestrator + auto-repair protected from re-enabling disabled workflows
auto-merge-sweeper reduced to */5

actions: Fixed 401 agent auth: generateOutboundAgentJwt replaces forwarded JWT in oas-sre-controller and execute controller
Added cronjob callback route: /api/cronjob/result POST + /api/cronjob/status/:execId GET
Fixed TS2769: parseExpiresIn() converts string to numeric seconds for jwt.sign

Deployed v3.8.2 (run 103) — SUCCESS: all 7 stages passed, CAP promoted, OaaS test confirmed working
lessons: jwt.sign expiresIn requires number (seconds) not string — @types/jsonwebtoken is strict
Always monitor corporate CI proactively — user expects autonomous detection and fixing
parseExpiresIn pattern: parse env string to seconds, fallback to 300
